{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric Combat Art
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Some opponents have mastered an [[Aetheric Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] has mastered an [[Aetheric Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
